subcodes.first_line: Blessed art thou, O My handmaiden, inasmuch as thou hast rent asunder the veils and recognized thy Lord, the Mighty, the All-Bountiful, Who hath been imprisoned in the most desolate of places [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لک یا امتی بما خرقت الاحجاب و عرفت ربک العزیز الوهاب الذی سجن فی اخرب
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @heaven and paradise; heaven and hell, @consolation and comfort
